name: Morphous Crane
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible ceremonial enterprise system to be coded from the Crane light and dark design-system boards: white feather surfaces, ink-black structure, red-crown focus, marsh-grey support, and ceremonial restraint. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for formal enterprise UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Restrained 8px grids, crane-neck vertical rhythm, ink-line dividers, formal enterprise cards, and ceremonial dashboard hierarchy.

validation.motifAlpha: Validated RGBA transparency with transparent corners after chroma-key removal.
validation.boardDimensions: Built-in imagegen output saved light and dark boards at 1672x941 after regeneration; both remain unscaled imagegen outputs.
